# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-20 by /mol:map (whole-repo scope, post-agent-modes-restructure refresh)._

## Inventory (layered)

Three-layer dependency direction: **workspace ← workflow ← agent**, with the
application shell (server / cli / plugins) on top and the UI downstream of
the server's OpenAPI surface. A small set of cross-layer primitives
(`molexp.path`, `molexp._typing`, `molexp._logger`, `molexp.entry`,
`molexp.monitor`, `molexp.tree_monitor`, `molexp._run_cancel`,
`molexp.config`, `molexp.git`) sit *above* the workspace layer but are
explicitly designed to be cited from any layer.

### Module list

**Layer 0 — `src/molexp/` (cross-layer primitives, package root)**
- `molexp` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports the user-facing hierarchy (`Workspace` / `Project` / `Experiment` / `Run` / `RunContext` / `Path` / `Logger` / `get_logger` / `entry` / `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace`); lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.
- `molexp._typing` — `JSONValue` and shared narrow typing aliases.
- `molexp._logger` — `Logger` (subclasses `mollog.Logger`) + `get_logger`; package-local logger factory.
- `molexp._run_cancel` — Cancel-helpers for the explore-tree monitor (molq job lookup / local PID / "cannot cancel" fallback).
- `molexp.entry` — `entry()` registry + `load_workspaces()` / `find_workflow_for_run()` / `load_workflow_from_entrypoint()`; the script-level workflow discovery surface.
- `molexp.monitor` — `RunMonitor`: lifecycle controller for the full-screen run dashboard (delegates rendering to `molq.dashboard.RunDashboard`).
- `molexp.path` — `Path` (subclasses `pathlib.PurePosixPath`); cross-host POSIX path primitive, no I/O.
- `molexp.tree_monitor` — Interactive collapsible workspace tree for `molexp workspace ... explore`.
- `molexp.config` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `loader.py`, `models.py`) — `MolCfg` / `ProfileConfig` / `load_molcfg` / `normalize_profile_name` / `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_subprocess.py`, `operations.py`, `worktree.py`) — `ensure_clone` / `fetch` / `push` / `GitWorktreeManager`; thin async wrappers around the `git` binary.

**Layer 1 — `src/molexp/workspace/` (bottom — pure storage)**
- `molexp.workspace` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public storage surface.
- `molexp.workspace.assets` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_adapter.py`, `accessors.py`, `artifact.py`, `base.py`, `checkpoint.py`, `data.py`, `error.py`, `execution.py`, `lineage.py`, `log.py`, `manifest.py`, `output.py`, `view.py`) — typed Asset hierarchy + per-scope manifest + `DataAssetLibrary`.
- `molexp.workspace.cache` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`) — `CacheFolder` singleton (lowercase property `ws.cache`); exposes `as_cache_store()` adapter for the workflow layer's `CacheStore` Protocol.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`, `index.py`) — `CatalogFolder` singleton (lowercase property `ws.catalog`) hosting `AssetCatalog`; assets re-export shim lives in `assets/catalog` for back-compat.
- `molexp.workspace.base` — atomic-JSON I/O (`atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`) + container-index helpers (`_rebuild_container_index` / `_load_metadata` / `_save_metadata`).
- `molexp.workspace.checkpoint` — `CheckpointState` model + file IO.
- `molexp.workspace.context` — `Context` data model.
- `molexp.workspace.errors` — workspace exception hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`).
- `molexp.workspace.experiment` — `Experiment(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.folder` — `Folder` base class (unified directory primitive: parent pointer, lazy mkdir, atomic JSON I/O, kind-checked metadata, generic five-verb CRUD `add_folder/get_folder/has_folder/list_folders/remove_folder`, auto-derived index filenames from `cls.__name__` snake_case + `.json`) + `WORKSPACE_ROOT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_PROJECT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_EXPERIMENT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_RUN_KIND` constants.
- `molexp.workspace.fs` — `FileSystem` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol` + `PathArg` alias + `StatResult` frozen dataclass; the pluggable I/O contract.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local` — `LocalFileSystem` (stdlib-backed: pathlib + os + shutil); structural conformance asserted at import.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote` — `RemoteFileSystem` (wraps `molq.transport.Transport` for SSH-backed workspaces).
- `molexp.workspace.metrics` — run-local JSONL metrics (in-tree, not a plugin).
- `molexp.workspace.models` — `FolderMetadata` (base for the agent-layer metadata models) + `WorkspaceMetadata` / `ProjectMetadata` / `ExperimentMetadata` / `RunMetadata` / `ExecutionRecord` / `ComputeTarget` / `ErrorInfo`.
- `molexp.workspace.param` — `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` / `Params`.
- `molexp.workspace.project` — `Project(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.resume_policy` — `WalltimeChunk` + resume policies.
- `molexp.workspace.run` — `Run(Folder)` + `RunContext` (sync + async context manager) + `RunStatus`.
- `molexp.workspace.schema_version` — JSON-schema version constant + load/upgrade helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.target` (new singular module) — `Target` value-type sum (`LocalTarget` / `RemoteTarget`), `parse_target` / `resolve_target` / `target_to_transport` / `target_to_filesystem`, `Session` / `SessionManager` (cached SSH connections), `TargetNotFound` / `TargetNeedsResolution`. The unified target abstraction the new CLI consumes.
- `molexp.workspace.targets` (legacy plural module, retained) — compute-target registry helpers (`add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `to_transport` / `target_run_dir`) backed by `WorkspaceMetadata.targets`.
- `molexp.workspace.utils` — `slugify` and small helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.workspace` — `Workspace(Folder)` entity + `set_cli_root_override`; the only `Folder` whose `parent` is `None`. Materializes its own root in `__init__`.

**Layer 2 — `src/molexp/workflow/` (middle — graph engine)**
- `molexp.workflow` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public OOP API.
- `molexp.workflow._graph_decl` — internal task-registration declarations (`TaskRegistration`, `LoopDecl`, `ParallelDecl`, `DependentParamsFn`, `_BoundaryStubTask`).
- `molexp.workflow._helpers` — `_callable_name` / `_stable_workflow_id` / `_to_snake_case` (private helpers).
- `molexp.workflow._names` — `generate_name` (adjective-gerund-noun ids for runs/executions).
- `molexp.workflow.builder` — `WorkflowBuilder` (mutable; decorator + OOP styles on one instance).
- `molexp.workflow.cache` — `Caching` (LRU) + `CacheEntry` + `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache_store` — `CacheStore` Protocol + `FileCacheStore` (workspace-backed adapter).
- `molexp.workflow.context` — `TaskContext` + `ActorContext` (read-only typed contexts).
- `molexp.workflow.contract` — sidecar contract layer: `WorkflowContract`, `TaskIO`, `TaskInputSpec`, `TaskOutputSpec`, `ArtifactDecl`, `ValidationCheck` / `ValidationCheckId` / `ValidationIssue` / `ValidationReport` / `Severity`, `default_validation_checks`, `validate_workflow_contract`.
- `molexp.workflow.promote` — `promote_callable` / `resolve_callable_entrypoint` / `resolve_spec_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.workflow.protocols` — `Runnable` / `Streamable` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol`s + structural typing aliases (`TaskBody`, `TaskOutput`, `UserDeps`, `JSONMapping`).
- `molexp.workflow.registry` — `TaskTypeRegistry` + `default_registry` (slug → factory).
- `molexp.workflow.serializer` — `WorkflowCompiler` + `default_compiler` (IR ↔ Python ↔ Mermaid ↔ YAML ↔ Spec; replaces old `compiler.py`).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot` — `TaskSnapshot` (AST-normalized identity).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot_ref` — `WorkflowSnapshotRef` (on-disk reference shape).
- `molexp.workflow.spec` — `Workflow` (compiled, frozen, content-hashed); carries the class-level `_bindings_registry` for `bind_to / for_experiment / is_bound_to / unbind_from`.
- `molexp.workflow.task` — `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC` base classes (NOT pg `BaseNode`).
- `molexp.workflow.types` — `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` re-export, edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges` / `BranchEdges` / `OutEdges`), error hierarchy, `Next` (IR-internal, not in `__all__`).
- `molexp.workflow.version` — `WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_graph` site; modules: `compiler.py` (`WorkflowGraphCompiler`), `node.py` (`WorkflowStep`), `persistence.py` (`RunStorePersistence`), `runtime.py` (`GraphWorkflowRuntime` + `make_execution_id`), `state.py` (`WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`, `CompiledWorkflow`).
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — JSON-Schema Draft-07 wire-format docs (`workflow.json`, `task_config.json`, `link.json`, `task_io.json`, `workflow_contract.json` + `README.md`).

**Layer 3 — `src/molexp/agent/` (top — LLM harness)**

Restructured by the `agent-modes-restructure` chain (2026-05-20, commits `7e2b221..cdaf127`). Three sub-areas — the shared `harness/` runtime, the `modes/` pipeline modes, the private `_pydanticai/` firewall — plus top-level orchestration files. The four pipeline modes are pi-inspired (github.com/earendil-works/pi) plain async-stage pipelines on the harness — not `pydantic_graph` graphs.

- `molexp.agent` (`__init__.py`) — package root; public surface = the mode-orchestration core + the workflow-orthogonal review primitive set.
- `molexp.agent.mode` — `AgentMode` ABC + `AgentRunResult`. `AgentMode.run(*, harness, user_input)` is an **async generator yielding `AgentEvent`s**, whose terminal yield is a `ModeCompletedEvent`. `AgentRunResult` is frozen pydantic (`text` / `messages` / `mode_state` / `usage` / `usage_breakdown` / `events`).
- `molexp.agent.runner` — `AgentRunner` + `AgentRunnerConfigError`. Builds + injects an `AgentHarness` per run (with a `LocalExecutionEnv` and an in-memory or Jsonl-backed `Session`); lazy `PydanticAIRouter` on first run. Two run surfaces: `run()` → terminal `AgentRunResult`; `run_events()` → live `AgentEvent` stream.
- `molexp.agent.router` — `Router` Protocol (text + structured paths) + `ModelTier` enum + `RouterTextResult` + `TierModels` alias; the interface `_pydanticai/router.py` implements.
- `molexp.agent.review` — workflow-orthogonal review **primitives** (per-step gates, distinct from `ReviewMode`): `ReviewPolicy` Protocol, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView` / `StepView`, `BypassPolicy` / `AutoPolicy` / `HumanPolicy`, `cli_ask`.
- `molexp.agent.folders` — `Agent(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.agent"`, owns typed `add_session / get_session / has_session / list_sessions / remove_session`) and `AgentSession(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.session"`, the on-disk conversation anchor — holds `agent_session.json`, `entries.jsonl` the harness entry-tree, optionally `messages.jsonl` via the lazy `_pydanticai.messages_codec`).
- `molexp.agent.folders_metadata` — `AgentMetadata` / `AgentSessionMetadata` (extend `FolderMetadata`); agent-internal, not re-exported from the package root.
- `molexp.agent.types` — `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal` / `GoalMode` (legacy, for in-flight session metadata), `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.settings` — `AgentSettings` (workspace-scoped tunables; frozen pydantic; agent-internal).
- `molexp.agent.harness` (subpackage) — the shared mode runtime:
  - `harness.py` — `AgentHarness` (plain runtime class; owns the live `Session`, the `AgentEvent` sink, `stage()` brackets, the unified `approve()` gate, `compact()`, `run_subprocess()`, the `HookRegistry`).
  - `events.py` — `AgentEvent` discriminated union (`ModeStarted/CompletedEvent`, `StageStarted/CompletedEvent`, `ApprovalRequested/DecidedEvent`, `ArtifactWrittenEvent`, `PlanEmittedEvent`, `PreflightFailedEvent`, `RepairProposedEvent`, `CompactionPerformedEvent`, `ErrorEvent`) + `AnyAgentEvent` + `EventSink`.
  - `session.py` / `session_storage.py` / `session_entry.py` — `Session` (append-only entry-tree + leaf pointer), `SessionStorage` Protocol + `JsonlSessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage`, the `SessionEntry` union (`MessageEntry` / `StageEntry` / `ApprovalEntry` / `ArtifactEntry` / `CompactionEntry` / `ModelChangeEntry`).
  - `compaction.py` — `CompactionSettings` / `CompactionPlan` / `prepare_compaction` / `estimate_tokens`.
  - `execution_env.py` — `ExecutionEnv` Protocol + `LocalExecutionEnv` (subprocess + hard timeout + confined `cwd`) + `ExecResult` / `ExecutionError`.
  - `hooks.py` — `HookRegistry` / `HookPoint` / `HookContext`.
- `molexp.agent.modes` (subpackage) — `ChatMode` plus four pipeline modes; each is an `AgentMode` driven as a plain async-stage pipeline on the harness:
  - `chat.py` — `ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig` (one LLM round-trip).
  - `plan/` — `PlanMode` / `PlanModeConfig`: a **read-only** seven-stage typed planner (intent synthesis → clarify → capability exploration → candidate synthesis → selection → plan-graph preflight → emit). Produces a typed `PlanGraph` + an `ApprovedPlanHandoff`; writes no executable code. Also `PlanFolder` (`kind = "agent.plan"`), `PlanGraphPreflightReport` / `run_plan_graph_preflight`, the `CapabilityProbe` Protocol + `NullCapabilityProbe` + `ProbeResult`.
  - `author/` — `AuthorMode` / `AuthorModeConfig`: materializes an approved `PlanGraph` — lowers it to a `molexp.workflow.WorkflowContract`, generates `workflow.py` + per-task source + tests + IR + manifest, runs each task's test through the harness `ExecutionEnv` with an LLM debug→repair loop, gated behind `approve_materialization`. Emits a `MaterializedWorkspaceHandoff`.
  - `run/` — `RunMode` / `RunModeConfig`: executes the materialized workflow via the public `molexp.workflow` API bound to a workspace `Run`, monitors per-step progress (`RunProgress` / `StepProgress`), repairs runtime failures (`PlanDiff` / `RepairEscalation`), gated behind `approve_execution`. Also `RunFolder` (`kind = "agent.run"`) + `RunReport`.
  - `review/` — `ReviewMode` / `ReviewModeConfig`: a **read-only** review of an existing plan / materialized workspace / completed run against the `IntentSpec`; three pure checkers → a typed `ReviewVerdict` (+ optional `PlanDiff`). Also `ReviewTarget` / `ReviewTargetKind` / `detect_review_target`, `StepFinding` / `build_review_verdict`, `ReviewVerdictFolder` (`kind = "agent.review"`).
  - `_planning/` — pure frozen-pydantic planning contracts shared by every mode (zero LLM, zero I/O): `IntentSpec` (+ `IntentConstraint` / `SuccessCriterion` / `ResourceBudget` / `RiskLevel` / `MissingInfoItem`); `PlanGraph` / `PlanStep` / `PlanStepIO` / `PlanStepInput` / `PlanStepArtifact` / `PlanCheck` / `RetryPolicy`; `CapabilityGraph` / `CapabilityNode` / `CapabilityEdge` / `CapabilityEdgeKind` / `EvidenceState`; `PlanState` lifecycle + `LEGAL_TRANSITIONS` / `assert_legal_transition`; `PlanDiff` / `PlanNodeOp` / `DiffOpKind` / `ApprovalGate`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_ai` site; `__all__ = []`. Modules: `router.py` (`PydanticAIRouter`), `capability_probe.py` (`PydanticAICapabilityProbe`, molmcp-backed) + `capability_probe_factory.py` (`build_capability_probe`), `mcp.py` (`build_mcp_server` / `check_stdio_handshake`), `messages_codec.py` (`dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`), `errors.py` (`ProviderError`), `events.py`, `retry.py`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `defaults.py`, `oauth.py`, `store.py`) — MCP **config** layer only (no tool dispatch): `McpStore` / `McpServerEntry` / `McpScope` / `McpSecretsStore` / `UnresolvedSecretError`; OAuth (`FileTokenStorage`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `build_oauth_provider`, …); defaults (`MCP_DEFAULTS`, `seed_user_defaults`, `MOLMCP_*`). Tool dispatch is pydantic-ai native (`Agent(toolsets=[MCPServerStdio(...)])`), under `_pydanticai/`.
- `molexp.agent.persistence` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `router.py`, `tiered.py`) — generic three-tier resource store (`TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`); shared infra consumed by `agent.mcp`.

**Layer 4 — `src/molexp/server/` (FastAPI app — top of application shell)**
- `molexp.server` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app` — `create_app()` factory, lifespan, bundled-UI discovery, CORS for dev.
- `molexp.server.dependencies` — `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings` (FastAPI DI).
- `molexp.server.exceptions` — typed HTTP exception classes.
- `molexp.server.handlers` — workspace-error → HTTP envelope translation (`ProjectNotFoundError` → 404, `*ExistsError` → 409, etc.).
- `molexp.server.manager` — `ServerManager` lifecycle (start/stop/status/logs).
- `molexp.server.routes` (subpackage with `create_api_router()`) — `agent.py`, `agent_admin.py`, `agent_tasks.py`, `agent_task_store.py` (**Slice-1 stubs — every agent-route call returns HTTP 503** pending the `server-routes-agent-rectification` rebuild around `AgentRunner`; not the live agent surface), `asset.py`, `catalog.py`, `execution.py`, `experiment.py`, `molq.py` (`/api/plugins/molq` read-only overview), `project.py`, `registry.py`, `review_store.py`, `reviews.py`, `run.py`, `targets.py` (compute-target CRUD), `workspace.py`, `_scope.py`.
- `molexp.server.schemas` (subpackage) — `requests.py`, `responses.py`, `molq.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_runs.py`.

**Layer 5 — `src/molexp/cli/` (Typer CLI — application shell)**
- `molexp.cli` (`__init__.py`) — Typer `app` instance + side-effect registration of `init`, `workspace`, `session`, `config`, `runs prune`, `target`, plus third-party plugin discovery via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli.__main__` — entrypoint shim.
- `molexp.cli._common` — shared rich console + `rprint` + `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` + `deterministic_run_id` + `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.config_cmd` — `molexp config` Typer app (read/write `~/.molexp/config.json`).
- `molexp.cli.init_cmd` — top-level `molexp init [PATH]` (ergonomic alias for `molexp workspace <path> init`).
- `molexp.cli.prune` — `molexp runs prune` (interactive hierarchical execution cleanup).
- `molexp.cli.session_cmd` — `molexp session` Typer app (cached SSH transport sessions).
- `molexp.cli.target_cmd` — `molexp target` Typer app (compute-target registry CRUD).
- `molexp.cli.workspace` (subpackage) — `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>`; the unified primary entrypoint that resolves `TARGET` (path / `user@host:/path` / `@target-name`) into `(target, transport, fs)` and dispatches to subcommands.
  - `__init__.py` — `workspace_app` + the resolution callback.
  - `explore.py` — `molexp workspace ... explore` (delegates to `molexp.tree_monitor`).
  - `interactive.py` — `run_interactive` REPL (`-i` mode).
  - `lifecycle.py` — `init` / `info` / `materialize` subcommands.
  - `monitor.py` — `monitor` / `watch` subcommands.
  - `resources.py` — `project` / `experiment` / `run` / `asset` resource subcommands (largest module — all entity CRUD lives here).
  - `run.py` — `run` subcommand (script-driven workflow execution).
  - `serve.py` — `serve` subcommand (FastAPI + bundled UI).
  - `sync.py` — `sync` / `exec` / `shell` for remote-target file ops.

**Layer 6 — `src/molexp/plugins/` (registered plugin packages)**
- `molexp.plugins` (`__init__.py`) — `Capability` enum (currently `GH` only), `PluginRegistry`, `CapabilityNotAvailable`, lazy GH loader, re-exports `CliPlugin` / `discover_cli_plugins` / `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli` — `CliPlugin` descriptor + `discover_cli_plugins()` + `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui` — `discover_ui_plugin_dirs()` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `client.py`, `models.py`, `queries.py`) — `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, GraphQL/REST models (`Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`).
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `dashboard.py`, `metadata.py`, `spec.py`, `staging.py`, `submit.py`) — molq scheduler submission + Remote Operations dashboard data source.

**Layer 7 — `ui/src/` (React 19 frontend — package-level summary)**
- `ui/src/App.tsx` + `index.tsx` + `env.d.ts` — entry shell.
- `ui/src/api/generated/` — auto-generated OpenAPI client (`core/`, `models/`, `services/`). **Never hand-edit**; regenerated with `npm run generate:api`.
- `ui/src/app/` — application root: `registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer map), `panels/`, `layout/`, `components/`, `runs/` (the runs dashboard subtree), `settings/`, `renderers/` (entity viewers + `agentEvents.ts` / `registerRenderers.ts`), `state/` (Zustand stores wrapping the generated client).
- `ui/src/components/` — shared presentational components + `ui/` shadcn-style primitives.
- `ui/src/lib/`, `ui/src/plugins/` (bundled plugin runtime — `core` / `metrics` / `molq` / `molvis`), `ui/src/resolvers/`, `ui/src/__fixtures__/`, `ui/src/styles/`, `ui/src/types/`.
- `ui/mocks/` — MSW handlers per route domain (`browser.ts` / `node.ts` / `handlers/`).
- Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Public surface

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- `molexp` (top-level): re-exports `Experiment`, `GridSpace`, `Logger`, `ParamSpace`, `Path`, `Project`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `UniformSpace`, `Workspace`, `entry`, `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` resolves `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.
- `molexp.path`: `Path` (subclass of `PurePosixPath`).
- `molexp._logger`: `Logger`, `get_logger`.
- `molexp.entry`: `entry`, `load_workspaces`, `find_workflow_for_run`, `clear_registry`, `load_workflow_from_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.monitor`: `RunMonitor`.
- `molexp.tree_monitor`: interactive tree-monitor entry (`run_explore` / consumed by `cli.workspace.explore`).
- `molexp.config`: `MolCfg`, `ProfileConfig`, `load_molcfg`, `normalize_profile_name`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git`: `ensure_clone`, `fetch`, `push`, `GitWorktreeManager`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- `molexp.workspace` exports: `Folder`, `FolderMetadata`, `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `Context`, `Params`, `ParamSpace`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `WorkspaceMetadata`, `ProjectMetadata`, `ExperimentMetadata`, `RunMetadata`, `ExecutionRecord`, `ComputeTarget`, `ErrorInfo`, `Asset`, `ArtifactAsset`, `DataAsset`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `CheckpointAsset`, `LogAsset`, `OutputAsset`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `ExecutionStateAsset`, `Producer`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetsView`, `AssetScope`, `AssetManifest`, `CacheFolder` (singleton class — accessed via `ws.cache` property), `LocalTarget`, `RemoteTarget`, `Target`, `TargetNotFound`, `Session`, `SessionManager`, the folder-kind constants `WORKSPACE_ROOT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_PROJECT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_EXPERIMENT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_RUN_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_CACHE_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_CATALOG_KIND`, the typed error hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`), the compute-target helpers (`add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `target_run_dir` / `to_transport`), target parsing (`parse_target`, `resolve_target`, `target_to_transport`), and atomic I/O (`atomic_write_json`, `atomic_write_text`).
- `molexp.workspace.fs`: `FileSystem` Protocol, `PathArg`, `StatResult`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local`: `LocalFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote`: `RemoteFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.assets`: adds `ASSET_ADAPTER`, `AnyAsset`, `parse_asset`, `ArtifactAccessor`, `CheckpointAccessor`, `LogAccessor`, `ImportAction`, and the `lineage` submodule.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog`: `AssetCatalog`, `CatalogFolder`, `RebuildReport`, `CATALOG_DIRNAME`, `CATALOG_FILENAME`, `CATALOG_SCHEMA_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workspace.cache`: `CacheFolder`, `WORKSPACE_CACHE_KIND`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- `molexp.workflow` exports: `Workflow`, `WorkflowBuilder`, `WorkflowCompiler`, `default_compiler`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` (re-export of `pydantic_graph.End`), `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `Caching`, `CacheStore`, `FileCacheStore`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `make_execution_id`, `promote_callable`, `resolve_callable_entrypoint`, `resolve_spec_entrypoint`, `generate_name`, the contract types (`WorkflowContract`, `TaskIO`, `TaskInputSpec`, `TaskOutputSpec`, `ArtifactDecl`, `ValidationCheck`, `ValidationCheckId`, `ValidationIssue`, `ValidationReport`, `Severity`, `default_validation_checks`, `validate_workflow_contract`), edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges`, `BranchEdges`, `OutEdges`), versioning (`WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`), and the error hierarchy (`WorkflowError`, `CycleError`, `EdgeShapeError`, `EntryAmbiguousError`, `UnknownTaskError`, `UnreachableTaskError`, `UnknownRouteError`, `MissingRouteError`, `WorkflowDeadlockError`, `ParallelExecutionError`, `LoopMaxItersExceeded`).
- `Next` is intentionally **not** in `__all__` (IR-internal routing token).
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private): `End`, `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `RunStorePersistence`, `GraphWorkflowRuntime` (consumed only by `workflow.spec` and `workflow.__init__`).

**Layer 3 — agent**
- `molexp.agent`: the mode-orchestration core — `AgentRunner`, `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentSession` (a re-export of the harness `Session` entry-tree class) — plus the workflow-orthogonal review primitives `ReviewPolicy`, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView`, `StepView`, `BypassPolicy`, `AutoPolicy`, `HumanPolicy`, `cli_ask`. No factories.
- `molexp.agent.harness`: `AgentHarness`; the `AgentEvent` union + each event class (`ModeStartedEvent` / `ModeCompletedEvent`, `StageStartedEvent` / `StageCompletedEvent`, `ApprovalRequestedEvent` / `ApprovalDecidedEvent`, `ArtifactWrittenEvent`, `PlanEmittedEvent`, `PreflightFailedEvent`, `RepairProposedEvent`, `CompactionPerformedEvent`, `ErrorEvent`) + `AnyAgentEvent` / `EventSink`; `Session`, `SessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage` / `JsonlSessionStorage`, the `SessionEntry` union (`MessageEntry` / `StageEntry` / `ApprovalEntry` / `ArtifactEntry` / `CompactionEntry` / `ModelChangeEntry`); `CompactionPlan` / `CompactionSettings` / `estimate_tokens` / `prepare_compaction`; `ExecutionEnv` / `LocalExecutionEnv` / `ExecResult` / `ExecutionError`; `HookRegistry` / `HookContext` / `HookPoint`.
- `molexp.agent.modes`: `ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig`, `PlanMode` / `PlanModeConfig`, `AuthorMode` / `AuthorModeConfig`, `RunMode` / `RunModeConfig`, `ReviewMode` / `ReviewModeConfig`; handoffs `ApprovedPlanHandoff` / `MaterializedWorkspaceHandoff`; folders `PlanFolder` / `RunFolder`; `RunProgress` / `StepProgress` / `RunReport` / `RepairEscalation`.
- `molexp.agent.modes._planning`: `IntentSpec` / `IntentConstraint` / `SuccessCriterion` / `ResourceBudget` / `RiskLevel` / `MissingInfoItem`; `PlanGraph` / `PlanStep` / `PlanStepIO` / `PlanStepInput` / `PlanStepArtifact` / `PlanCheck` / `RetryPolicy`; `CapabilityGraph` / `CapabilityNode` / `CapabilityEdge` / `CapabilityEdgeKind` / `EvidenceState`; `PlanState` / `LEGAL_TRANSITIONS` / `IllegalPlanTransitionError` / `assert_legal_transition` / `is_legal_transition` / `legal_successors`; `PlanDiff` / `PlanNodeOp` / `DiffOpKind` / `ApprovalGate`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan`: also `CapabilityProbe` / `ProbeResult` / `NullCapabilityProbe`, `PlanGraphPreflightReport` / `run_plan_graph_preflight`, `AGENT_PLAN_KIND`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.review`: also `ReviewTarget` / `ReviewTargetKind` / `detect_review_target`, `ReviewVerdict` / `StepFinding` / `build_review_verdict`, the three checkers (`check_intent_conformance` / `check_capability_evidence` / `check_lifecycle_consistency`), `ReviewVerdictFolder` / `AGENT_REVIEW_KIND`.
- `molexp.agent.router`: `Router` (Protocol), `ModelTier`, `TierModels`, `RouterTextResult`.
- `molexp.agent.folders`: `Agent`, `AgentSession` (the on-disk Folder subclass — distinct from the `molexp.agent` `AgentSession` re-export, which is the runtime harness `Session`), the kind + filename constants.
- `molexp.agent.types`: `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp`: `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, OAuth helpers (`FileTokenStorage`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`), defaults (`MCP_DEFAULTS`, `seed_user_defaults`, `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME`, `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`, `MOLMCP_*`).
- `molexp.agent.persistence`: `TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private): `__all__ = []` — `PydanticAIRouter`, `PydanticAICapabilityProbe`, `build_capability_probe`, `build_mcp_server`, `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`, `ProviderError` are reachable only via dotted internal paths.

**Layer 4 — server**
- `molexp.server`: `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app`: `create_app`, `lifespan`.
- `molexp.server.dependencies`: `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- `molexp.server.routes`: `create_api_router` + per-domain routers (`agent` / `agent_admin` / `agent_tasks` — 503 stubs, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `project`, `registry`, `reviews`, `run`, `targets`, `workspace`).
- `molexp.server.schemas`: wide pydantic surface for OpenAPI codegen — request models (`*Request`), response models (`*Response`), molq overview, workspace-runs aggregate. See `src/molexp/server/schemas/` for the full enumeration; this surface drives `ui/src/api/generated/`.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- `molexp.cli`: `app` (Typer instance). Top-level commands: `molexp init`, `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>` (primary entrypoint), `molexp session …`, `molexp config …`, `molexp runs prune`, `molexp target …`. Third-party plugins discovered via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli._common`: `console`, `rprint`, `_TERMINAL_STATUSES`, `deterministic_run_id`, `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.workspace`: `workspace_app` Typer; subcommands attached as side effects from `explore`, `interactive`, `lifecycle`, `monitor`, `resources`, `run`, `serve`, `sync`.

**Layer 6 — plugins**
- `molexp.plugins`: `Capability` (`GH` only), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry`, `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli`: `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui`: `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh`: `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, `Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq`: scheduler submission helpers; submodules `submit`, `metadata`, `spec`, `dashboard`, `staging` provide the surface.

**Layer 7 — ui**
- TypeScript ESM exports — primary surface is the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`api/generated/`). Hand-written modules export per-file React components (`*Viewer.tsx` / `*Inspector.tsx` / `*Page.tsx` / `*Panel.tsx`), Zustand store hooks, `registerRenderers()`, `resolvers/index.ts`, MSW handler arrays, the contribution-registry runtime, and the bundled plugin entrypoints. Public registration points: `app/registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer), `app/renderers/registerRenderers.ts`, `plugins/runtime.ts` (UI-plugin loader), `mocks/handlers/` per-domain handler arrays.

### Style summary

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- naming: snake_case modules; underscore prefix (`_logger`, `_run_cancel`, `_typing`) marks "shared infra used by every layer but not part of the public surface".
- construction: pure data + thin helpers; no I/O at import (the cancel helpers / monitors lazy-load `molq.dashboard`).
- error handling: `RunMonitor` / `tree_monitor` recover from missing molq job ids with structured warning return rather than raising.
- I/O discipline: `Path` is pure path arithmetic — never reaches the filesystem; the filesystem `Path` (stdlib) is reached only through `workspace.fs_local`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- naming: `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` functions; `*Metadata` pydantic models for on-disk shapes; `*Asset` for typed asset variants; `*ExistsError` / `*NotFoundError` for typed exceptions; `Folder` subclasses live alongside their entity module (`workspace.py` / `project.py` / `experiment.py` / `run.py` / `cache/folder.py` / `catalog/folder.py`).
- construction: pure-data types are `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)`; runtime entities are `Folder` subclasses with explicit `__init__`; child factories (`workspace.add_project(...)`, `project.add_experiment(...)`, `experiment.add_run(...)`) are idempotent and lazy — no I/O in `__init__` except `Workspace`, which materializes its own root.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `errors.py` carry the entity id; atomic JSON via temp-file + `os.replace` in `LocalFileSystem.atomic_write_json`; folder kind validation (`_KIND_PATTERN`); the generic five-verb CRUD raises `*NotFoundError` on strict get, returns cached on idempotent add.
- I/O discipline: **every I/O call routes through `self._fs` (a `FileSystem` Protocol)** — never raw `pathlib.Path.read_text` etc. `LocalFileSystem` and `RemoteFileSystem` are the two stock implementations.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- naming: builder/spec separation (`WorkflowBuilder` → `Workflow` after `.build()`); `*_to_*` method names on `WorkflowCompiler`; error class names `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types `<Noun>Edges`.
- construction: value types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)` (e.g. `WorkflowResult`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `WorkflowVersion`, `WorkflowContract` / `TaskIO` / `ValidationReport`); runtime container `WorkflowExecution` is a plain class because it holds live asyncio state; `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` subclasses (NOT pg `BaseNode`); `_pydantic_graph/` is the only subtree allowed to use `@dataclass` (forced by pg's contract).
- error handling: `WorkflowError` hierarchy raised at compile time; `ParallelExecutionError` aggregates per-element failures with index-keyed dict; `LoopMaxItersExceeded` is a non-fatal `Warning`; cache `read` corruption is logged + entry deleted (never re-raised); compile-time validation in `WorkflowGraphCompiler.compile` fails fast.
- single-track scheduler: one `WorkflowStep` `BaseNode` drives the whole scheduler; `_invoke_one` cascades `Task → Actor → Runnable → Streamable → callable`; `Next(label)` deliberately not in `__all__`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- naming: `AgentMode` ABC + concrete `<Verb>Mode` + a paired `<Verb>ModeConfig`; the shared runtime is `agent/harness/`, the pure contracts `agent/modes/_planning/`, the pydantic-ai firewall `agent/_pydanticai/`. Each pipeline mode lives under `modes/<verb>/` and is a plain async sequence of harness `stage()` brackets.
- construction: `AgentRunner(mode=, model=/models=/router=)` with exactly-one-of validation; the `PydanticAIRouter` and the `AgentHarness` are built lazily / per-run. Pure data is `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)` — `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` is **forbidden** here; runtime containers (`AgentHarness`, `Session`, `LocalExecutionEnv`, the storage impls, `AgentRunner`) are plain classes with explicit `__init__`.
- mode contract: `AgentMode.run(*, harness, user_input)` is an async generator yielding `AgentEvent`s; the terminal yield is a `ModeCompletedEvent` carrying the `AgentRunResult`. Modes drive their pipeline through the `AgentHarness` (events, session entry-tree, the three `ApprovalGate`s via `harness.approve()`, compaction, `ExecutionEnv`). AuthorMode + RunMode additionally use the public `molexp.workflow` API to build / execute the generated experiment workflow.
- error handling: typed `AgentFailure` / `FailureKind`; `ExecutionError` is the subprocess-failure boundary; `_pydanticai.errors.ProviderError` is the single SDK-failure boundary; preflight / runtime failures surface as `PreflightFailedEvent` / `RepairProposedEvent` carrying a `PlanDiff`.
- import discipline: `import molexp.agent` loads **neither** SDK; `pydantic_graph` is **never** imported under `agent/`; only `agent/_pydanticai/*.py` may `import pydantic_ai`; the `harness/` modules import neither SDK — compaction summarization flows through the `Router` Protocol.

**Layer 4 — server**
- naming: route modules named after the domain entity (`run.py`, `experiment.py`, `targets.py`, …); request schemas suffixed `*Request`, response schemas suffixed `*Response`; per-domain `APIRouter` aggregated by `create_api_router()`.
- construction: routes registered via `include_router`; FastAPI DI through `Depends(get_workspace)` / `Depends(get_settings)`; lifespan async context manager; CORS in dev, static-file mount in production.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `server/exceptions.py` mapped to JSON envelopes by `handlers.py:register_exception_handlers`; bundled-frontend lookup via `importlib.resources` falls back gracefully when `dist/` empty.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- naming: command modules named `<verb>_cmd.py` at the top level (`init_cmd`, `config_cmd`, `session_cmd`, `target_cmd`); the primary `molexp workspace …` entrypoint is itself a subpackage (`cli.workspace`) with one file per subcommand (`explore.py`, `lifecycle.py`, `resources.py`, …).
- construction: single Typer `app` instance built in `cli/__init__.py`; sub-typer apps (`workspace_app`, `session_app`, `config_app`, `target_app`, `runs_app`) are attached via `add_typer`; resolution of `TARGET` happens in the `workspace_app` callback, which stores `(target, transport, fs)` on `ctx.obj` for subcommands.
- error handling: per-plugin `try / except Exception` with `logger.warning` so one broken plugin cannot prevent the CLI from booting; `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` constant for non-cancellable run states.

**Layer 6 — plugins**
- naming: subpackage names `<category>_<implementation>` (`submit_molq`); one subpackage per `Capability`; `gh.client.GitHubClient` is async-only.
- construction: capability lazy loader pattern (`_load_gh()` imports `httpx` + the impl); `PluginRegistry` caches success / failure per `Capability`; `CliPlugin` is a frozen `__slots__` class with `register: Callable[[typer.Typer], None]`.
- error handling: every entry-point load wrapped in `_safe_load` / `_safe_resolve`; `api_version` mismatches and duplicate plugin ids are warned + skipped, never raised; `CapabilityNotAvailable` carries an `_INSTALL_HINTS` install hint.

**Layer 7 — ui**
- naming: PascalCase for components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`, `*Page.tsx`, `*Panel.tsx`); camelCase for hooks (`use*`); kebab-case for routes; `state/` holds Zustand stores; bundled plugin packages live under `plugins/<id>/` with a `index.ts` registration entrypoint.
- construction: React 19 + Rsbuild; renderers registered via `registerRenderers.ts` keyed by entity-type strings in `app/registry.ts`; bundled plugins registered via `plugins/runtime.ts` + `contribution-runtime.ts`; OpenAPI client regenerated by `npm run generate:api` (never hand-edit `api/generated/`); MSW handlers under `mocks/handlers/` mirror server route domains 1:1.
- error handling: panels render fallbacks for missing data; UI-plugin loader logs and skips broken bundles; OAuth callback page surfaces backend errors verbatim.

### Layer roles

- `molexp.path` / `molexp._typing` / `molexp._logger` / `molexp.entry` / `molexp.monitor` / `molexp.tree_monitor` / `molexp._run_cancel` / `molexp.config` / `molexp.git` — **Layer 0 (cross-layer primitives)**. Citable from any layer. They MUST NOT import any of `molexp.workspace`, `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli` at module load (`molexp.entry` and `molexp.monitor` lazy-import workspace types inside functions or under `TYPE_CHECKING`).
- `molexp.workspace` — **Layer 1 (workspace)**, bottom of the dependency DAG. Pure storage primitive. Owns the `Folder` base class, the `FileSystem` Protocol + two implementations, assets, hierarchy, atomic JSON, the singleton `CacheFolder` / `CatalogFolder`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`, `pydantic_ai`, or `pydantic_graph`.
- `molexp.workflow` — **Layer 2 (workflow)**. Graph engine. Uses `molexp.workspace` only (for `Run`, `RunContext`, `atomic_write_json`, the `CacheFolder.as_cache_store()` adapter). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.agent` or `pydantic_ai`. May import `pydantic_graph` **only** under `workflow/_pydantic_graph/`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` — **Layer 2 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_graph` site in the repo. `WorkflowStep` is the single `BaseNode` molexp exposes; rest is molexp-owned scheduling.
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — **Layer 2 / wire-format**. JSON-Schema documents consumed by the agent layer's IR emitters and the server's IR round-trip.
- `molexp.agent` — **Layer 3 (agent)**, top of the core dependency DAG. LLM harness. Uses `molexp.workspace` and `molexp.workflow` through their public surfaces. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`. May import `pydantic_ai` **only** under `agent/_pydanticai/`; **never** imports `pydantic_graph`; `import molexp.agent` must not eagerly load either SDK.
- `molexp.agent.harness` — **Layer 3 / shared runtime**. The `AgentHarness` every mode drives — the `AgentEvent` stream, the `Session` entry-tree + `SessionStorage` repository, context compaction, the `ExecutionEnv` subprocess abstraction, the `HookRegistry`. Imports neither pydantic SDK (compaction summarization flows through the `Router` Protocol).
- `molexp.agent.modes._planning` — **Layer 3 / pure contracts**. Frozen-pydantic planning types (`IntentSpec` / `PlanGraph` / `CapabilityGraph` / `PlanState` / `PlanDiff`); zero LLM, zero I/O — the substrate every mode reads.
- `molexp.agent.modes` — **Layer 3 / modes**. `ChatMode` plus the four pipeline modes (`plan` / `author` / `run` / `review`), each a harness-driven async-stage pipeline. Folder kinds `agent.plan` / `agent.run` / `agent.review`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` — **Layer 3 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_ai` site (`router.py`, `capability_probe.py` + `capability_probe_factory.py`, `mcp.py`, `messages_codec.py`, …); agent's other submodules consume only the Protocols defined in `agent/router.py` / `agent/modes/plan/protocols.py`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` / `molexp.agent.persistence` — **Layer 3 / agent subsystems**. The MCP config layer and the generic three-tier resource store.
- `molexp.server` — **Layer 4 (application shell — FastAPI app)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. UI is downstream via OpenAPI codegen. Owns route-domain split + Pydantic schemas for the wire.
- `molexp.cli` — **Layer 5 (application shell — Typer CLI)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. Organized around `molexp workspace [TARGET] …` as the primary entrypoint, with `init` / `session` / `config` / `runs prune` / `target` as top-level siblings. Discovers third-party CLI plugins via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.plugins` — **Layer 6 (registered plugin packages)**. Registry of optional capabilities (`GH` only). Discovers third-party CLI / UI plugins via entry-point groups.
- `ui/src` — **Layer 7 (frontend)**. React 19 SPA. Downstream of `molexp.server` via the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`ui/src/api/generated/`). Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Deletions verified absent (vs. 2026-05-19 blueprint)

The `agent-modes-restructure` chain (2026-05-20, commits `7e2b221..cdaf127`) replaced the entire agent-mode subsystem. Modules the previous blueprint listed that are now gone:

- **agent layer** — the old codegen `PlanMode` subpackage internals: `agent/modes/plan/{_pipeline,_bookends,tasks,tasks_capability,context,errors,schemas,handoff,state}.py` (the 13-task materialize-to-workspace pipeline) are replaced by the harness-based seven-stage read-only planner. `agent/session.py` (the runtime `AgentSession` value class) is replaced by `agent/harness/session.py:Session`. `agent/capability_discovery.py` and `agent/capability_hints.py` are gone — capability discovery is now the typed `CapabilityGraph` plus the `_pydanticai/capability_probe.py` molmcp-backed probe. The old `agent/modes/review.py` `NotImplementedError` placeholder is replaced by the real `agent/modes/review/` package. `PlanRunHandoff` → `ApprovedPlanHandoff`; the `PlanStatus` `Literal` → the `PlanState` enum. `ChatMode`'s former 1-task-workflow form (`CHAT_WORKFLOW` / `ChatTurn`) is replaced by a direct harness round-trip.
- The earlier `agent-pydanticai-rectification` deletions remain confirmed absent: `agent/_pydanticai/{harness,provider}.py`, `agent/{sessions,context,memory,recovery,skills,tools}/`, `agent/mcp/{source,tool_store,probe}.py`, and the `_legacy_types.py` / `observability/` / `orchestration/` / `sandbox.py` / `service.py` / `model*.py` / `planning/` / `coding_protocol.py` set.
- **workspace / workflow / cli / sweep** — unchanged since the 2026-05-19 blueprint: `workspace.subsystem.SubsystemStore` remains absent (singletons subclass `Folder` directly); `workflow.compiler` remains renamed to `workflow.serializer`; the `cli/` reorganization around `cli/workspace/` holds; `src/molexp/sweep/` remains removed.
<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
